meta.title: Ponos | AI-Powered Operations for Service Companies
meta.description: We automate invoicing, dispatch, scheduling, and reporting for service companies with AI connected to your real data.
meta.ogTitle: Ponos | AI-Powered Operations for Service Companies
meta.ogDescription: We automate invoicing, dispatch, scheduling, and reporting for service companies with AI connected to your real data.

hero.headline: Your operations, running on their own.
hero.subtitle: AI agents that automate invoicing, billing, reports, and dispatch — connected to your real data, delivered where you already work.

frictionBadges.tryNow: Try the experience — no sign-up needed

problema.title: Is your team still doing this by hand?
pains: Building invoices by copying data between systems — 15 min each
Your best people wasting hours on billing, reports, and follow-ups
Data in Excel, the CRM, and email — never matches
You found out about the overdue invoice when the client complained
solutions: Invoices generated and sent automatically when the job is done
AI agents that handle billing, reports, and follow-ups for you
One source of truth connected to your real systems
Automatic alerts before the problem escalates

impactStats.title: Numbers we didn't make up
impactStats.subtitle: Measured with JPRO Solutions — our first invoicing automation client.

roi.title: Before vs. After — with real data
roi.subtitle: Measured results with JPRO Solutions. Every row is a real process we automated.

rows.before: Email by email, one at a time

servicios.title: What We Automate
servicios.subtitle: Each service connects your existing tools and eliminates manual work.

items.title: Invoicing & Billing
items.description: End-to-end invoicing automation. Job completion triggers invoice generation, PDF creation, and client delivery. Zero manual work.

items.title: Dispatch & Scheduling
items.description: Automatic technician assignment by proximity. Smart scheduling based on location, availability, and job type.

items.title: Reporting & Alerts
items.description: Daily briefings, overdue payment alerts, and operational reports delivered via WhatsApp or email. Data from your systems, in real time.

items.title: WhatsApp Operations
items.description: AI agent on WhatsApp connected to your database. Your team queries data, sends emails, and manages operations from their phone.

items.title: Custom Integrations
items.description: Connect your existing tools — Service Fusion, QuickBooks, CRMs, ERPs — into one automated workflow.

demos.title: See how it works
demos.subtitle: Try it yourself — these are real interactive demos.

prompts.aiMsg:
Good morning! Here's your summary:

📊 Pending invoices: 8 ($12,450 USD)

📅 Meetings today: 2 (10am Logística Norte, 3pm Grupo Andino)
✅ Tasks completed yesterday: 5/7

prompts.userMsg: How many pending invoices do I have?
prompts.aiMsg:
You have 8 pending invoices for $12,450 USD:

2. Grupo Andino — $5,200 (3 days)
3. Transportes Valle — $1,900 (overdue 5d)

prompts.aiMsg:

Dear Carlos,

I am writing to kindly request the warranty document for equipment LN-450.

We look forward to your response.

Best regards,
Victoria — Ponos AI

steps.title: Diagnosis
steps.description: We analyze your processes, data, and channels to identify where AI generates the greatest impact.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.description: We build and integrate the solution into your existing systems. No migration, no disruption.

steps.title: Results
steps.description: Your team receives reports, alerts, and automations where they already work: WhatsApp, email, or your platform. And every month, the agent gets more precise.

aiGrows.sectionLabel: An agent that grows with you
aiGrows.title: Every month, your AI agent becomes more useful
aiGrows.subtitle: It's not a static script. It's an agent that learns your operation and adapts.

items.title: Executes
items.description: Automates operational tasks: invoicing, reports, alerts. Your team stops doing repetitive manual work.

items.title: Learns
items.description: Recognizes your recurring clients, most-used workflows, and preferred formats. Fewer corrections, more precision.

items.title: Anticipates
items.description: Detects patterns: peak demand seasons, late-paying clients, workload spikes. Alerts you before there's a problem.

items.title: Optimizes
items.description: Suggests improvements you didn't know you needed. New automations, more efficient processes, opportunities you were missing.

trust.title: We connect your systems. We never replace them.

items.title: Your data never leaves your systems
items.description: We connect to your existing tools via API — your CRM, ERP, accounting system, or management platform. We don't copy, store, or migrate your information.

items.title: Minimal access, maximum results
items.description: We only request the permissions needed for each automation. Nothing more. You can revoke access at any time.

items.title: No vendor lock-in
items.description: Your data lives in your tools, not ours. If you leave Ponos, your systems keep working exactly the same.

items.title: Full transparency
items.description: Every action the AI agent takes is logged. You know exactly what it did, when, and why.

items.name: JPRO Solutions
items.quote: We process ~25 invoices per day. Before, each one took 15 minutes of manual work — pulling data from Service Fusion, creating the invoice in QuickBooks, generating the PDF, and emailing it. Now Ponos does it automatically: the user just reviews and approves. We save over 6 hours every day.

items.name: Ponos
items.quote: We use our own tools internally. If we don't trust what we build, why would you?

integrations.title: Works with what you already use
integrations.subtitle: No migrations. No stack changes. We connect your existing tools.

founder.name: Jesus David Pinilla
founder.quote: I built Ponos because I saw too many companies with valuable processes trapped in spreadsheets and manual work — not for lack of will, but because nobody showed them how to bring those processes to technology. Ponos exists to close that gap: we understand your operation, optimize it, and automate it with AI.
founder.credential3: Builds and operates Ponos AI agents

cta.title: How many hours is your team losing this week?
cta.subtitle: In 30 minutes we diagnose your processes and show you exactly what can be automated.

agendar.title: Book your free consultation
agendar.subtitle: 30 minutes to explore how AI can transform your operations.
